intended_use: CellaVision® DC-1 is an automated cell-locating device intended for in-vitro diagnostic use in clinical laboratories. The CellaVision Peripheral Blood Application is intended for differential count of
intended_use_full: CellaVision® DC-1 is an automated cell-locating device intended for in-vitro diagnostic use in clinical laboratories. The CellaVision Peripheral Blood Application is intended for differential count of white blood cells (WBC), characterization of red blood cell (RBC) morphology and platelet estimation.
target_condition: Abnormal blood morphology flagged by automated cell counters
ground_truth: CellaVision® DM1200 analyzer (predicate device) verified results
other_metrics: Overall Agreement (OA) reported for WBC and RBC. Cohen's Kappa coefficient for PLT: 0.89405 (95% CI: 0.87062 to 0.91748). Linear regression accuracy for WBC with slope 0.8-1.2 and intercept ±0.2 met acceptance criteria.
